name: Hccb

values.name: barcode
values.comment:
Generate an HCCB (High Capacity Color Barcode) SVG in HTML

# Example use
`barcode standardSpec 100 100 [1, 2, 3, 4]`
values.type: Specification -> Float -> Float -> Data -> Html msg

values.name: standardSpec
values.comment:
The "standard" specification for an HCCB barcode. Note that you can quite
    easily change the size--it should be readable. If you change the padding,
    strip height, insets, or dimensions, however, it may not be readable.

name: Hccb.Specification
comment:
Specification for High Capacity Color Barcode (HCCB)

# Usage
Usually, you just need the `standardSpec` Specification exposed by the main
Hccb module. However, if you need to customize the size or other factors of
an HCCB barcode, you can do so.

@docs Specification, Size

aliases.name: Size
aliases.comment: Size of an HCCB. `cols` across and `rows` down.

aliases.name: Specification
aliases.comment: The parameters that define how to draw an HCCB
aliases.type: { bits : Bits, size : Size, whiteFramePad : Pad, blackBackgroundPad : Pad, whiteStripHeight : Float, rowInset : Float, triangleDim : Dim }
